title: melampyrum sylvaticum var. laricetorum
intro: Melampyrum sylvaticum var. laricetorum, also known as woodland melampyrum or larix woodland melampyrum, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Melampyrum sylvaticum var. laricetorum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially reducing the severity of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
